_notes: Racing Kit. LANE-FIT: road tiles are 1x1 unit (measured; +X/+Z corner at max.x=0.65, max.z=-0.65, hence corner-anchor). Forgiving-arcade target = 12 m track (matches the roads kit's 12 m two-lane — the lane-fit rule keeps road-bearing kits consistent), so scale = 12.0 (an initial 8 drove too tight). Cubic cell_size [12,12,12] = footprint(1) x scale, for the bridge/ramp vertical stacking. cell_center_y = false. Y-OFFSETS MEASURED FROM AABBs: the ground-authored bridge corners (deck at native 0..0.117) must lift to the straight-span deck (roadStraightBridgeMid base 0.383) -> lift 0.393 native = 4.716 at scale 12; roadStraightBridgeMid is already at deck height so its offset drops to 0. Bridge use is decorative until the island -> re-verify then. X-offsets (roadStart/roadStartPositions) scaled to the 12 m lattice. COLLISION FLAG: pitsGarageClosed/Corner are solid garage BUILDINGS, not drive-on surfaces, so they are box (never welded into the drivable body) — the drivable pit LANE is the separate thin roadPit* palette tile.
